CustomField.label: BiOp Reinit: Action Modified
CustomField.description: ESA §7 BiOp reinitiation trigger per 50 CFR §402.16(a)(4). When checked by a field inspector, NEPA_BiOp_Reinitiation_Checker fires and creates a High-priority ESA Coordinator Task if an active BiOp exists on the parent IndividualApplication. Also adds +12 pts to nepa_challenge_risk_delta__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: [50 CFR §402.16(a)(4)] Action is subsequently modified in a manner that causes effect not previously considered. Field detection: Compare current construction/operation footprint to BiOp-authorized footprint at each inspection
